title: Changes to the OTN emission terms
text-1: This message is to inform you about the
text-1-strong: changes to our OTN emission terms.
text-2: Please be informed that next Monday, February 12th, 2018
text-2-strong: OTN tokens will no longer be emitted on the IQ Option trading platform
text-2-2: to be credited as a reward for trading Crypto assets.
text-3: New terms of OTN token distribution will be established by the OTN Foundation in the nearest future. Furthermore, we’d like to reinforce that token airdrops of 2M OTNs will still take place once a calendar quarter.
question-1: If you have any questions, please direct them to
